source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/01_DHF/05_HnX-P1, HnX-PB/03_설계개발 출력/02_CCL 및 승인원/5. Rechargeable battery/085-28224697-000 CERT_CB.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: CB Test Certificate for a rechargeable Li-polymer battery model DABP8S1PA found in conformity with IEC 62133-2:2017 and IEC 62133-2:2017/AMD1:2021.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports regulatory evidence of CB Scheme conformity for the listed rechargeable Li-polymer battery, with the associated test report forming part of the certificate.
keyPoints: Product is identified as Batteries (Rechargeable Li-polymer Battery).
Applicant and manufacturer are MPLUS Electronics Co., Ltd. in the Republic of Korea.
Factory is FULLYMAX BATTERY CO., LTD. in Huizhou City, Guangdong Province, People's Republic of China.
Ratings are nominal voltage 29.6Vd.c. and rated capacity 1470mAh.
Test Report Ref. No. 085-28224697-000 forms part of the certificate.
